facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place. Locals shop here every morning. The day market on 49 Đường Ngô Quyền is where Phu Quoc actually buys its groceries, snacks, and fresh produce. No menus. No English signs. Just real island life at street level. If you want to understand a place, start with its market. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Locals filling baskets at 49 Đường Ngô Quyền while tourists queue at the resort buffet. This is the Phu Quoc day market. Real produce, real prices, real island. Go early.

instagram.caption: Tourists keep walking past this. Locals shop here every morning. The day market on 49 Đường Ngô Quyền is Phu Quoc unfiltered. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Baskets, fresh produce, zero tourists. The Phu Quoc day market hits different at 7am. Go before the crowds wake up.

tiktok.caption: Tourists skip this every day. Locals don't. 49 Đường Ngô Quyền, go early. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #MarketFinds

video_script.hook: Locals don't post about this market.
